title: Highlighting Molecular Biology as a Focal Point for Mosquito Research.
abstract: Chiu, M. Z., Lannon, S., Luchetti, M., Wells, M. B., Andrew, D. J. Dissection and immunostaining of larval salivary glands from Anopheles gambiae mosquitoes. Journal of Visualized Experiments. (175), e62989 (2021). Kojin, B. B., Tsujimoto, H., Jakes, E., O'Leary, S., Adelman, Z. N. Indel detection following CRISPR/Cas9 mutagenesis using high-resolution melt analysis in the mosquito Aedes aegypti. Journal of Visualized Experiments. (175), e63008 (2021). Journal of Visualized Experiments. (175), e63158 (2021). Taracena, M. et al. Effective oral RNA interference (RNAi) administration to adult Anopheles gambiae mosquitoes. Standard membrane feeding assay for the detection of Plasmodium falciparum infection in Anopheles mosquito vectors. Journal of Visualized Experiments. (183), e63546 (2022).
